M

MainActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller which screen the user should start on if the user is found immediately log them in otherwise move them to authentication

MAX_ENTRANTS - Static variable in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivity
 
mergeManagedEvents(List<EventItem>, List<EventItem>) - Static method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
merges hosted Events and coorganized Events into one list without duplicates
MessageActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Displays a single direct message conversation.
MessageActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MessageActivity
 
MessageThreadAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Adapter used to display message threads in a list.
MessageThreadAdapter(Context, List<MessageThreadItem>, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MessageThreadAdapter
creates the adapter for displaying message threads
MessageThreadItem - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Represents a single direct message thread between two users.
MessageThreadItem() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MessageThreadItem
creates an empty message thread object for Firebase
MessageThreadItem(String, String, String, String, String, String, long, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MessageThreadItem
creates a message thread object
MyThingsActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
This is a class that is the controller of the activity_my_things screen this is the activity that allows navigation to modify profile, events, waitlist also shows notifications that have been received
MyThingsActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
 
MyThingsActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
UI Tests for MyThingsActivity
MyThingsActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivityTest
 
MyWaitlistActivity - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
screen where the entrant can view waitlist and invitation * statuses This is a class that is the controller of the activity_my_waitlist screen It is the activity that allows users to see the list of events they have signed up for
MyWaitlistActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivity
 
MyWaitlistActivityTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Tests the functionality of the MyWaitlistActivity this activity shows the events that the current user is signed up to it also allows navigation from a waitlist entry into the event details screen
MyWaitlistActivityTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivityTest
